raw_output_payload.reasoning: Need find modified in last 60 days: -mtime -60. tar -czf. Use find with -print0 and tar --null -T. Command: tar -czf /mytarfile.tgz -C /system/folder1 $(find . -maxdepth 1 -type f -mtime -60 -print). But better: tar -czf /mytarfile.tgz -C /system/folder1 $(find . -maxdepth 1 -type f -mtime -60 -printf "%P\n") . Use -C. Simpler: tar -czf /mytarfile.tgz -C /system/folder1 $(find . -maxdepth 1 -type f -mtime -60 -printf "%P\n") .
